messages.content: Hi there, it's so nice to talk to you. What brings you in today?

prescription.treatment_plan: Since the diagnosis is 'Undetermined', no specific medication can be prescribed at this time. Further evaluation and diagnostic tests are needed to determine the underlying condition and develop an appropriate treatment plan.
prescription.drug_interaction_check: Clear based on RxNorm, as no medications have been prescribed.

referral.specialist_escalation: Refer the patient to a relevant specialist for further evaluation and diagnosis.
referral.follow_up_plan: Schedule a follow-up appointment within 1-2 weeks to review diagnostic test results and develop a treatment plan based on the determined diagnosis.

soap_note.subjective: The patient presented with a complaint, but the specifics have not been determined yet.
soap_note.objective: No objective findings have been recorded at this time.
soap_note.assessment: The diagnosis is currently undetermined and requires further evaluation.
soap_note.plan: A comprehensive assessment and diagnostic workup will be conducted to determine the underlying cause of the patient's complaint.
